delete.description:
删除委托。

curl命令调用示例:
```
curl -v -H "Content-Type:application/json" -H "x-auth-token: ******" -X DELETE "https://ip:port/rest/vdc/v3.0/vdc-agencies/06b38f8a54f7454d92c7768c627019ab"
```

|SLA项|定义|
|-----|-----|
|请求成功率| >=99.9%|
|可用性|Tier1|
|数据一致性|最终一致,不一致时长<1分钟|
|吞吐量|60次/分钟|
|吞吐量|10次/秒|
|TP50请求时延|1500ms|
|TP99.9请求时延|3000ms|

parameters.description: 接口支持的用户token。拥有moscapp:organization-agency:action或moscapp:organization-policy-agency:action权限的token。
parameters.name: x-auth-token

500.description: 默认ServiceException异常码,应用内部错误。
